title: O(n log n) comparison count of merge sort
statement_informal: With a level budget k such that length l <= 2^k, merge sort performs at most k * length l comparisons; for the least such k = ceil(log2 n) this is n*ceil(log2 n).

cost_model.notes: Divide-and-conquer recurrence T(n) <= 2T(n/2)+n, bounded by the level-parameterized k * length l with length l <= 2^k.

references: Knuth, TAOCP Vol. 3 (merge sort) — fact only, no prose copied
